title: artemisia eriopoda var. maritima
intro: Artemisia eriopoda var. maritima, also known as Maritime Wormwood, is a subspecies of the Artemisia eriopoda plant, a shrub-like perennial native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain compounds such as camphor and thujone. The health benefits of Maritime Wormwood include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiparasitic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, reducing fever, and combating intestinal parasites. Maritime Wormwood can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
